commercialCoverPolicy: Full portfolio assets use project-created SVG artwork only. No commercial cover layout, image, logo, publisher mark, marketplace image, or generated image reference is used.
pilotSelectionRationale: The accepted T06 pipeline is expanded to every canonical v1.2 edition. Each work receives one unique visual family shared by its English and Vietnamese editions.
